headline: Broadcom’s AI Research Push Links Chip Packaging Advances To Growth Story
summary: Broadcom, Meta, UCLA and other partners are launching a US$125 million AI semiconductor research and talent hub over five years. The company is also working with Applied Materials on next generation AI chip packaging technologies. Both efforts focus on energy efficient, high performance AI computing and closer ties between industry and academia. For investors watching NasdaqGS:AVGO at a share price of about US$414.57, these moves sit alongside a very strong multi year share price run, with...

headline: Why Applied Materials (AMAT) Stock Is Up Today
